name: NATURAL HEALTH TRENDS CORP
summary: Natural Health Trends Corp (NHTC) is a direct-selling company that markets and sells health, wellness, and lifestyle products. The company operates through a network of independent members who sell its product line, which includes nutritional supplements and personal care items. NHTC conducts business internationally, with significant operations in Asia and other global markets.
